key_points.our_fit_analysis: GO with acknowledged stretch — JD asks 5+ yrs program mgmt; Jamie has ~3 yrs. Cover is honest about this ('this role asks for more years than I have'). All resume content maps to real experience: 20+ programs / 10+ vendors / 70+ staff / -75% onboarding / 25+ stakeholders / 600+ webinar participants / 78% enrollment (InGenius); $362K leave-cost executive insight + NGO leadership diagnosis (ODN, collective); 2,000+ employee analysis -> C-suite (NextGen).
